oakheaven sanatorium is the most respectful, professional, and reliable mental hospital in town. but, in reality, the sanatorium is a hell behind closed doors. patients lashing out, workers abusing patients. that's where mihkel comes into play, a tormented soul who only knows anger and blood. he will kill anyone of the workers of the hospital every chance he gets, but... there's only one person that he holds in a pedestalŌĆöyou.
the only one who can tame the beast with your very presence.
